US KIA: 15+ (no new under ceasefire D40-D60). Brent $111.16 = gas/food prices creating political headwinds. War fatigue: 56% wrong direction (Pew D52) — likely risen further. Congressional pushback on War Powers could fracture Republican unity. Trump's 'bomb Iran' base still supportive but economic pain narrative growing.

Iran: Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal = public signal of willingness to compromise on conventional war, not on sovereignty. Araghchi-Putin meeting = regime showing eastern solidarity for domestic consumption. Business internet partial Day 22 = some economic relief. Citizens still cut off (Day 61 = 1,464+ hours). IRGC maintaining dual blockade = regime showing strength. Internal: reformist Araghchi submitted proposal; Putin meeting means hardline faction also signed off — unusual consensus.

Global: Brent $111.16 (+2.71%). UN food emergency warning = global food/supply chain concern now mainstream. Russia openly backing Iran (Putin-Araghchi). China watching oil — major buyer. India watching oil. Pakistan mediating actively. Europe facing energy price pressure. G7 emergency consultations reported. Market pricing structural $105-115 range, not panic spike.

Markets: D49: Brent $84 (Hormuz opening). D50: $90 (re-closure). D52: $95.42 (Touska + expiry fears). D55: $101+ (Francesca+Epaminondas seizures). D59 close: $108.22. D60: $111.16. Trajectory: steady climb on dual blockade + UN food emergency. Options markets: 45% chance $120+ Brent within 30 days if ceasefire breaks. WTI $99.40 = approaching $100 psychologically significant.
publicOpinion_fa: آمریکا: ساعت قانون اختیارات جنگی امروز منقضی — بحران سیاسی داخلی احتمالی. گاز نزدیک $۴.۵۰. KIA ۱۵+ (بدون جدید D40-D60). خستگی جنگ در حال افزایش. کنگره فشار می‌آورد.

ایران: پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای = نشانه عمومی انعطاف روی جنگ متعارف. عراقچی-پوتین = همبستگی شرقی برای مصرف داخلی. اینترنت کسب‌وکار روز ۲۲ جزئی. شهروندان ۱٬۴۶۴+ ساعت قطع. سپاه محاصره دوگانه را حفظ می‌کند = نمایش قدرت.
جهان: برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶. اخطار غذایی سازمان ملل. روسیه آشکارا از ایران حمایت. چین و هند نگران نفت. اروپا فشار انرژی. G7 مشاوره اضطراری. بازار $۱۰۵-۱۱۵ به عنوان تعادل ساختاری قیمت‌گذاری.
بازارها: D49: $۸۴. D50: $۹۰. D52: $۹۵.۴۲. D55: $۱۰۱+. D59 بسته: $۱۰۸.۲۲. D60: $۱۱۱.۱۶. مسیر صعودی پیوسته در محاصره دوگانه + اخطار غذایی. WTI $۹۹.۴۰ — نزدیک $۱۰۰ مرز روانی.
hormuz: DUAL BLOCKADE — DAY 15 (D60). US: 31+ vessels turned back. IRGC: ~3 vessels/day seized/blocked. US naval blockade of Iranian ports active since Apr 14 (D46). IRGC counter-blockade: ~3 vessels/day through Hormuz. MSC Francesca + Epaminondas still held (seized D55-D56). USS Spruance still holding M/V Touska. Iran's D60 proposal: Hormuz reopens IF US ends war NOW + lifts blockade. US rejected nuclear deferral clause. 900+ ships stranded globally. Cape routing premium: $3-5M/ship. UN food emergency warning issued Apr 28.

IRAN'S DEFERRED-NUCLEAR PROPOSAL INCLUDES HORMUZ REOPENING (D60). Iran's new proposal via Pakistan explicitly includes Hormuz reopening as part of deal: end war + lift blockade → Hormuz opens immediately. Nuclear talks would follow separately. US/Trump rejected the proposal because nuclear talks cannot be deferred. This means: even if Iran offered full immediate Hormuz reopening, US won't accept without nuclear commitment. Hormuz is HOSTAGE TO NUCLEAR DEADLOCK.

MINES: 200+ REMAIN. CLEARANCE PAUSED 21+ DAYS. Mine clearance paused since D40 ceasefire. No progress D40-D60. Deal required before formal clearance. Without deal: mines = 6-12 months minimum before insurance normalization. Lloyd's JWC listed entire Persian Gulf. War risk premium 3.8% hull value. Hormuz open-water transit insurance: $12M+/voyage.

DUAL BLOCKADE ECONOMICS: $111 BRENT + UN FOOD EMERGENCY. Brent $111.16 (+2.71% D60) — structural supply shortage, not spike. Dual blockade has removed ~20% of seaborne oil from market. Cape routing adds 14 days to Asia deliveries. UN Secretary-General Apr 28: Hormuz standoff risks global food emergency (40+ nations depend on Persian Gulf food imports). Every week of dual blockade = $2-3B in global supply chain losses.

IRGC COUNTER-BLOCKADE TACTIC: ~3 VESSELS/DAY SEIZURE/BLOCKADE. IRGC systematic: seize 2-3 vessels per day in Hormuz-adjacent waters. Strategy: force US to choose between escalating enforcement or accepting de facto IRGC Hormuz control. MSC Francesca (D55, container ship), Epaminondas (D56, bulk carrier), M/V Touska (D51, cargo), Tifani (D54, tanker). IRGC using seized vessels as diplomatic leverage for Touska crew + M/V prisoner exchanges.
hormuz_fa: محاصره دوگانه — روز ۱۵ (D60). آمریکا: ۳۱+ کشتی برگشته. سپاه: ~۳ کشتی/روز. محاصره دریایی آمریکا از ۱۴ آوریل. محاصره متقابل سپاه: ~۳ کشتی/روز. MSC Francesca + Epaminondas هنوز در توقیف. توسکا هنوز. پیشنهاد D60 ایران: هرمز را باز می‌کنیم اگر جنگ الان تمام شود. آمریکا رد. ~۹۰۰+ کشتی معطل. اخطار غذایی سازمان ملل ۲۸ آوریل.

پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای ایران شامل بازگشایی هرمز (D60). پیشنهاد ایران از طریق پاکستان به صراحت شامل بازگشایی هرمز است: جنگ + محاصره را تمام کنید → هرمز فوراً باز. مذاکرات هسته‌ای جداگانه بعداً. آمریکا رد کرد چون هسته را نمی‌توان به تعویق انداخت. معنا: حتی اگر ایران هرمز را فوری باز کند، آمریکا بدون تعهد هسته‌ای قبول نمی‌کند. هرمز گروگان بن‌بست هسته‌ای.
مین: ۲۰۰+ باقی. پاکسازی ۲۱+ روز متوقف. متوقف از D40. بدون پیشرفت D40-D60. نیاز به توافق. لویدز کل خلیج را لیست کرد. حق‌بیمه ۳.۸٪. بیمه هرمز: $۱۲M+/سفر.

اقتصاد محاصره دوگانه: برنت $۱۱۱ + اخطار غذایی سازمان ملل. برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶ — کمبود ساختاری نه جهش. محاصره دوگانه ~۲۰٪ نفت دریایی از بازار حذف. پیمایش دماغه ۱۴ روز اضافه. دبیرکل سازمان ملل ۲۸ آوریل: هرمز خطر اضطرار غذایی جهانی. هر هفته محاصره = $۲-۳B خسارت زنجیره تأمین.

تاکتیک محاصره متقابل سپاه: ~۳ کشتی/روز. سپاه سیستماتیک: ۲-۳ کشتی/روز در آب‌های مجاور هرمز. استراتژی: آمریکا را مجبور کن یا تشدید یا کنترل هرمز توسط سپاه را بپذیرد. MSC Francesca (D55)، Epaminondas (D56)، توسکا (D51)، Tifani (D54). سپاه کشتی‌های توقیف‌شده را به عنوان اهرم دیپلماتیک استفاده می‌کند.
keyActors: Trump: D60 posture: War Powers clock expired today — potential constitutional issue. 'Cold' to Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal (via Rubio: 'must block nuclear weapons'). Ceasefire extended indefinitely at D54. Brent $111.16 = gas/food political headwinds. Options: (A) continue indefinite ceasefire while demanding nuclear; (B) resume strikes to force nuclear deal; (C) declare victory and withdraw. War Powers expiration may constrain option (B) politically.

Iran FM Araghchi: KEY ACTOR D57-D60. Traveled to Pakistan (D57-D58), Oman (D58), then St. Petersburg to meet Putin (D60). Araghchi is Iran's diplomatic lead — now carrying both the deferred-nuclear proposal AND the Putin-alignment message. This dual track (propose flexibility to US + secure Russian backing) is Araghchi's strategy: negotiate from strength.

Putin / Russia: NEW KEY ACTOR D60. Putin met Araghchi at St. Petersburg with Lavrov + Belousov (Defence) + Adm. Kostyukov (GRU-equivalent military intelligence). Putin: 'We see how courageously Iran is fighting — we will do everything to serve Iran's interests.' Putin confirmed receipt of personal message from Mojtaba Khamenei. Russia now acting as Iran's security patron — this changes the geopolitical calculus significantly.

Pakistan PM Sharif: Still active mediator. Requested the indefinite ceasefire extension (D54). Now relaying Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal to US. Pakistan walking a tightrope: US ally + Iran mediator. Pakistani army chief Munir-Tehran contacts ongoing. Pakistan's mediation is the last active diplomatic channel.

UN Secretary-General: NEW KEY ACTOR D60. Issued formal food emergency warning Apr 28 — Hormuz dual blockade threatens global food supply for 40+ nations. This internationalizes the Hormuz issue beyond oil/energy into food security. Creates new pressure on both sides for resolution.

IRGC: 21 days of ceasefire = extended maintenance + repositioning. Dual blockade continues (~3 vessels/day seized). MSC Francesca + Epaminondas + Touska still held as leverage. IRGC is the veto player on whether Iran accepts any deal — deferred-nuclear proposal could not have been submitted without at least IRGC acquiescence.
keyActors_fa: ترامپ: D60: ساعت اختیارات جنگی امروز منقضی. سرد به پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای (روبیو: باید هسته مسدود شود). آتش‌بس نامحدود D54. برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶ = فشار سیاسی داخلی. گزینه‌ها: ادامه آتش‌بس با اصرار بر هسته؛ از سرگیری ضربات؛ اعلام پیروزی.

عراقچی (وزیر خارجه ایران): بازیگر کلیدی D57-D60. به پاکستان (D57-D58)، عمان (D58)، سپس سنت‌پترزبورگ برای دیدار پوتین (D60). هم پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای حمل می‌کند هم پیام همراستایی با پوتین. مذاکره از موضع قدرت.

پوتین / روسیه: بازیگر کلیدی جدید D60. پوتین با لاوروف + بلوسوف + دریاسالار کوستیوکوف (اطلاعات نظامی) با عراقچی دیدار کرد. پوتین: 'همه کار می‌کنیم تا منافع ایران تأمین شود.' پیام مجتبی خامنه‌ای به پوتین تأیید شد. روسیه حالا حامی امنیتی ایران است.
شریف نخست‌وزیر پاکستان: میانجی فعال. درخواست تمدید نامحدود D54. پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای ایران را به آمریکا می‌رساند. تعادل: متحد آمریکا + میانجی ایران. آخرین کانال دیپلماتیک فعال.
دبیرکل سازمان ملل: بازیگر کلیدی جدید D60. اخطار رسمی اضطرار غذایی ۲۸ آوریل — محاصره هرمز تهدید غذایی ۴۰+ کشور. مسئله هرمز را فراتر از نفت به امنیت غذایی بین‌المللی می‌کند.

سپاه پاسداران: ۲۱ روز نگهداری + موضع‌گیری. محاصره متقابل ادامه دارد (~۳ کشتی/روز). Francesca + Epaminondas + توسکا هنوز در توقیف. سپاه وتوکننده هر توافق — پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای بدون اجازه سپاه ممکن نبود.

exponentialDecay.label: Depletion Model
exponentialDecay.description: Assumes stockpiles structurally depleted — exponential decay continues to zero
exponentialDecay.description_fa: فرض بر اتمام ساختاری ذخایر — کاهش نمایی تا صفر ادامه دارد
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome: Iran ceases offensive operations by mid-April. War ends via military exhaustion + negotiated exit. Coalition declares victory.
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران عملیات تهاجمی را تا اواسط آوریل متوقف می‌کند. جنگ با فرسایش نظامی + خروج مذاکره‌ای پایان می‌یابد.
exponentialDecay.falsifiedBy: D38-D39 at 41-58/day. Ceasefire D40 = political stand-down, not exhaustion. Definitively falsified.

plateauRationing.label: Rationing Model
plateauRationing.description: Assumes plateau at ~30/day = strategic rationing from deeper stockpiles (IRGC D16 claim)
plateauRationing.description_fa: فرض بر جیره‌بندی استراتژیک از ذخایر عمیق‌تر (ادعای سپاه D16)
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome: Iran maintained ~45-58/day through D39, then stood down by political decision in ceasefire. Validates strategic rationing thesis — capability preserved for diplomatic leverage.
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران آزار ۲+ ماه. هاآرتص: نیمی پرتاب‌کننده‌ها سالم. جنگ با مذاکره یا تشدید.
plateauRationing.falsifiedBy: None. D40 ceasefire = political pause, stockpile thesis intact.

vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion: D60 6.5 (unchanged D41-D60). 21 straight days zero missile/drone launches. Ceasefire = IRGC full maintenance, repositioning, strategic pause. Zero launches = stockpiles perfectly preserved. Naval asymmetric (Francesca, Epaminondas, Touska, Tifani seized) = demonstrating capability without missile expenditure. Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal = political decision, not military limitation. Score stays 6.5 — ceasefire is political, not exhaustion.
vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion_fa: روز ۶۰: ۶.۵ (ثابت D41-D60). ۲۱ روز صفر موشک/پهپاد. آتش‌بس = نگهداری کامل سپاه. صفر پرتاب = ذخایر حفظ شده. ناهمتراز دریایی (Francesca، Epaminondas، توسکا) = نمایش توان. پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای = تصمیم سیاسی نه فرسایش. ۶.۵ ثابت.
vectorNotes.economicPain: D60 9.5 (UP from 9.4 D59). Brent $111.16 (+2.71%). WTI ~$99.40 — approaching $100 psychologically. Trajectory: $84 (D49) → $90 (D50) → $95 (D52) → $101 (D55) → $108 (D59) → $111.16 (D60). Structural uptrend, not spike. UN food emergency warning Apr 28. Iran petrochemicals still suspended ($54M/day). Dual blockade removing ~20% seaborne oil. Cape routing $3-5M/ship premium. US gas approaching $4.50 threshold. Score 9.5 = $100-120 Brent + chokepoint + food emergency.
vectorNotes.economicPain_fa: روز ۶۰: ۹.۵ (↑ از ۹.۴). برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶ (+۲.۷۱٪). WTI ~$۹۹.۴۰. صعود ساختاری: $۸۴→$۹۰→$۹۵→$۱۰۱→$۱۰۸→$۱۱۱.۱۶. اخطار غذایی سازمان ملل. پتروشیمی متوقف. محاصله دوگانه ~۲۰٪ نفت دریایی حذف. گاز $۴.۵۰+.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum: D60 2.0 (UP from 1.5 D59). Iran submitted deferred-nuclear proposal via Pakistan = +1 (first formal proposal in 7+ days). US cold/rejection = -0.5. Araghchi-Putin meeting = -0.5 (signals Iran hardening fallback, not softening). Net: 2.0 — slight uptick on Iran proposal but structural gap unchanged. Pakistan actively mediating. UN food emergency = +0.5 new international pressure vector. War Powers expiration = new diplomatic dimension.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum_fa: روز ۶۰: ۲.۰ (↑ از ۱.۵). ایران پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای داد = +۱. آمریکا سرد = -۰.۵. عراقچی-پوتین = -۰.۵. خالص: ۲.۰. شکاف ساختاری تغییر نکرد. پاکستان میانجی. سازمان ملل +۰.۵. اختیارات جنگی بُعد جدید.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability: D60 3.5 (DOWN from 3.7 D59). War Powers 60-day clock expired today = new political constraint. Brent $111.16 = gas approaching $4.50 threshold. US KIA: 15+ (no new under ceasefire). War fatigue rising but no escalation pressures. War Powers issue: if Congress acts, political sustainability drops further (congressional authorization vote could split Republicans). Score 3.5 = 45-55% approval range, $4.50 gas, War Powers complication.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability_fa: روز ۶۰: ۳.۵ (↓ از ۳.۷). ساعت اختیارات جنگی امروز منقضی = محدودیت سیاسی جدید. برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶ = گاز نزدیک $۴.۵۰. KIA ۱۵+ (بدون جدید). خستگی جنگ افزایش. اگر کنگره عمل کند: بیشتر کاهش.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance: D60 1.8 (UP from 1.4 D59). Ceasefire Day 21 = slight improvement (21 days without incident = more distance from ceiling). Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal = diplomatic engagement = slight pullback from ceiling. But: War Powers expiration = new uncertainty vector; Russia backing Iran = Iran less likely to back down; Brent $111+ = economic ceiling approaching. Score 1.8 reflects modest improvement from ceasefire stability but persistent nearness to multiple ceilings (economic ceiling, nuclear deadlock ceiling, War Powers legal ceiling).
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance_fa: روز ۶۰: ۱.۸ (↑ از ۱.۴). آتش‌بس روز ۲۱ = بهبود اندک (۲۱ روز بدون حادثه = کمی فاصله از سقف). پیشنهاد دیپلماتیک ایران = عقب‌نشینی اندک از سقف. اما: انقضای اختیارات جنگی + روسیه پشت ایران + برنت $۱۱۱ = سقف‌های متعدد هنوز نزدیک.

warOutcome.prediction: D60 (Apr 28): STALL + NUCLEAR DEADLOCK AS THE NEW EQUILIBRIUM. Ceasefire Day 21 holding indefinitely. Iran submitted deferred-nuclear proposal (reopen Hormuz + end war NOW, nuclear later) — US rejected (Rubio: nuclear must be in deal). Araghchi-Putin meeting signals Iran building eastern support for long haul. War Powers 60-day clock expired today. Most likely: extended stall (24%) + escalation threat (43%) = 67% chance conflict resolution delayed 3-12+ months. Deal requires Iran to include nuclear or US to defer nuclear — neither likely near-term. Brent $111.16 = structural equilibrium. Recovery: Deal scenario → Q4 2026. Stall → FY28.
warOutcome.prediction_fa: روز ۶۰ (۲۸ آوریل): بن‌بست + بن‌بست هسته‌ای به عنوان تعادل جدید. آتش‌بس روز ۲۱ نامحدود. ایران پیشنهاد تعلیق هسته‌ای داد — آمریکا رد. عراقچی-پوتین = ایران برای مسیر طولانی. ساعت اختیارات جنگی امروز منقضی. محتمل‌ترین: بن‌بست (۲۴٪) + تشدید (۴۳٪) = ۶۷٪. توافق → Q4 2026. بن‌بست → FY28.
warOutcome.derivation: Military exhaustion 6.5 (unchanged — 21 straight days zero attacks; IRGC full maintenance; stockpiles intact; naval seizures demonstrating capability without missile expenditure). Economic pain 9.5 (UP — Brent $111.16 +2.71%; structural uptrend $84→$111; UN food emergency warning; dual blockade removing ~20% seaborne oil; WTI $99.40; US gas $4.45+). Diplomatic momentum 2.0 (slight UP — Iran's deferred-nuclear proposal = genuine flexibility +1; US rejection -0.5; Araghchi-Putin = hardening fallback -0.5; Pakistan active; War Powers new dimension). US political sustainability 3.5 (DOWN — War Powers clock expired today; Brent $111 = gas $4.45+; no new KIA but constitutional crisis). Escalation ceiling distance 1.8 (UP from 1.4 — 21-day ceasefire buffer; Iran proposal = diplomatic engagement; but nuclear deadlock + War Powers + economic ceiling persist).
warOutcome.derivation_fa: Military(6.5 ثابت — ۲۱ روز صفر). Economic(9.5 ↑ — برنت $۱۱۱.۱۶؛ سازمان ملل؛ WTI $۹۹.۴۰). Diplomatic(2.0 ↑ — پیشنهاد +۱؛ رد -۰.۵؛ پوتین -۰.۵). Political(3.5 ↓ — اختیارات جنگی منقضی؛ گاز $۴.۴۵+). Escalation(1.8 ↑ — ۲۱ روز؛ پیشنهاد؛ بن‌بست هسته‌ای ادامه).
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation: Convergence 4.9/10 — STABLE since D52. D52: 4.9 → D55: 4.9 → D57: 4.8 → D59: 4.85 → D60: 4.9. Weighted: Military(6.5×0.25=1.625) + Economic(9.5×0.20=1.90) + Diplomatic(2.0×0.20=0.40) + Political(3.5×0.20=0.70) + Escalation(1.8×0.15=0.27) = 4.895 → 4.9. Economic pain rising (9.5) offset by slight diplomatic improvement (Iran proposal 2.0) and slightly improved escalation ceiling (1.8). Political declining (3.5) on War Powers + Brent $111. Structural equilibrium: 4.9 = frozen conflict zone — enough pressure for talks but insufficient for breakthrough. If Iran accepts nuclear in deal: jumps to 7.0+. If war resumes: drops to 2.0-3.0.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation_fa: همگرایی ۴.۹ از ۱۰ — پایدار از D52. محاسبه: Military(1.625) + Economic(1.90) + Diplomatic(0.40) + Political(0.70) + Escalation(0.27) = ۴.۸۹۵ → ۴.۹. درد اقتصادی ↑ (۹.۵)، دیپلماسی کمی ↑ (۲.۰)، سیاسی ↓ (۳.۵). تعادل ساختاری: ۴.۹ = منطقه تعارض منجمد.

supplyChainTimeline.estimate: Deal + 1-2 weeks (if deal) OR FY28 (if escalation)
supplyChainTimeline.detail: D52 update: Deal 18% — much lower than D48's 31%. Ceasefire expires TOMORROW. Business internet partial Day 7 = partial coordination possible NOW. If D53 strikes resume: warehouse potentially in danger zone again. Use business internet window today to verify warehouse status before potential blackout.
82,000+ structures damaged. Warehouse status unknown. Need physical inspection + digital inventory reconciliation.
700km overland through Tabriz-Agarak. Border congestion likely. Customs uncertain. 3x normal cost. 14-21 day transit.
Full chain: Tehran warehouse → overland → Armenia/Turkey → air freight → Atlanta → UPS. Every link currently broken.
Requires: Hormuz open, Dubai air cargo resumed, banking normalized, publishing industry recovered. Each is months away.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.

سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.

Lloyd's JWC listed entire Persian Gulf. War risk premium 3.8% of hull value (from 0.02% pre-war). Won't normalize until mines cleared + 90 days incident-free.
Requires: mines cleared, insurance normalized, port infrastructure repaired, Bab al-Mandab safe (Houthi factor). 1,000+ stranded tankers to process.

sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution — it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.

leadingIndicators.signal: Steady at ~41/day. Rationing model holds. Coordinated barrage + IRGC defiance = institutional continuity proven.
$109.53 settled. Wall Street surged on hope. Markets vs reality mismatch. Binary: $85 or $130+ in <20 hrs.
10/day. Iran 10-pt demands Hormuz toll recognition = permanent change. Won't reopen for temp ceasefire.
Iran 10-pt = most detailed response ever. Islamabad Accord + 10-pt counteroffer = highest specificity. But MAXIMALIST gap.
Declining further. Trump 'I don't know' = allies questioning strategy. Mirror: 'TACO Trump.' IAEA 'deeply concerned.'

ceasefireCalibration.source: Polymarket ceasefire-holds ~18% (down from 20%). Active blockade = maritime war. Trump 'deal' talk partially offsetting. Historical base rate ~50%. 7 days to expiry.

incidents.description: Israel struck 100+ sites in Lebanon. Iran accused US of ceasefire violation via proxy.
incidents.description_fa: اسرائیل بیش از ۱۰۰ هدف در لبنان را بمباران کرد. ایران آمریکا را به نقض آتش‌بس از طریق نماینده متهم کرد.

incidents.description: Lebanon strikes continued. Iran demands Lebanon inclusion in ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: حملات لبنان ادامه. ایران خواستار شمول لبنان.

incidents.description: US warships attempted Hormuz transit. IRGC issued 'last warning.' Israel rejected Hezbollah ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: ناوهای آمریکا تلاش عبور هرمز. سپاه 'آخرین هشدار.' اسرائیل رد آتش‌بس حزب‌الله.

incidents.description: 21-hour talks collapsed. Iran refused nuclear commitment. Vance walked out. No new talks scheduled.
incidents.description_fa: مذاکرات ۲۱ ساعته شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس خارج شد. مذاکرات جدید برنامه‌ریزی نشده.

incidents.description: Trump declared naval blockade of all Iranian ports starting Monday 10AM ET. CENTCOM confirmed. Iran calls it 'piracy' and 'act of war during ceasefire.'
incidents.description_fa: ترامپ محاصره دریایی تمام بنادر ایران از دوشنبه ۱۰ صبح اعلام کرد. سنتکام تأیید. ایران: 'دزدی دریایی' و 'اقدام جنگی حین آتش‌بس.'

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah exchanges continue. 2,055+ killed in Lebanon. Ceasefire does not cover Lebanon.
incidents.description_fa: تبادل آتش اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه. ۲٬۰۵۵+ کشته لبنان.

incidents.description: US Navy blockade went into effect 10AM ET. All maritime traffic to/from Iranian ports blocked. Ships between non-Iranian ports allowed. China-linked sanctioned tanker tested blockade.
incidents.description_fa: محاصره دریایی نیروی دریایی آمریکا ساعت ۱۰ صبح فعال شد. تمام ترافیک دریایی بنادر ایران مسدود. نفتکش تحریمی چینی محاصره را آزمایش کرد.

incidents.description: Thousands rally in Tehran against blockade. Iran FM: 'piracy.' IRGC: 'ports for everyone or no one.'
incidents.description_fa: هزاران نفر در تهران علیه محاصره تظاهرات. وزیر خارجه: 'دزدی دریایی.' سپاه: 'بنادر برای همه یا هیچ‌کس.'

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah exchanges continue. Lebanon 2,055+ killed. UK urged Lebanon inclusion in ceasefire. Rubio talks Tuesday.
incidents.description_fa: تبادل آتش اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه. لبنان ۲٬۰۵۵+ کشته. روبیو مذاکرات سه‌شنبه.

incidents.description: Blockade Day 2 fully implemented (CENTCOM). 13 ships turned away cumulative. No boardings. Iran FM: 'piracy.' Trump Fox Business: 'close to over, very close to over.'
incidents.description_fa: محاصره روز دوم به طور کامل اجرا شد (سنتکام). ۱۳ کشتی بازگردانده شد. ترامپ: «بسیار نزدیک به پایان است.»

incidents.description: Iran spokeswoman Mohajerani: $270B war compensation demand. 5-pt counter: end attacks + security guarantees + $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty + intl recognition.
incidents.description_fa: سخنگوی ایران مهاجرانی: مطالبه ۲۷۰ میلیارد دلار غرامت جنگ. شرایط ۵ ماده‌ای ایران.

incidents.description: Israel-Hezbollah strikes continue. Lebanon dead 2,100+. UN experts condemn 'unprecedented' Israeli bombing.
incidents.description_fa: حملات اسرائیل-حزب‌الله ادامه دارد. لبنان بیش از ۲۱۰۰ کشته. کارشناسان سازمان ملل بمباران را «بی‌سابقه» محکوم کردند.

incidents.description: Gen. Caine WIDENED blockade scope WORLDWIDE — US forces will stop any vessel 'tied to Tehran or carrying supplies' (weapons, oil, metals, electronics) anywhere globally, including Pacific. 14 ships turned away cumulative. Hegseth: 'ready to restart combat' if no deal.
incidents.description_fa: ژنرال کین دامنه محاصره را در سراسر جهان گسترش داد — هر کشتی متصل به تهران در هر نقطه از جهان متوقف می‌شود. هگست: آماده از سرگیری جنگ.

incidents.target: Persian Gulf + Sea of Oman + Red Sea
incidents.description: Iran armed forces threatened to block Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, AND Red Sea shipping in retaliation for worldwide blockade. Rhetorical — 10-day zero-attack streak intact.
incidents.description_fa: نیروهای مسلح ایران تهدید به مسدود کردن خلیج فارس، دریای عمان و دریای سرخ کردند. ۱۰ روز بدون حمله.

incidents.description: Iran unilaterally declares Hormuz 'open' for commercial transit without US agreement; creates navigation confusion as US maintains port blockade. Oil briefly dips on relief.
incidents.description_fa: ایران یک‌طرفه تنگه هرمز را ‘باز’ اعلام کرد بدون موافقت آمریکا؛ سردرگمی در کشتیرانی. نفت برای لحظاتی کاهش یافت.

incidents.description: Iran re-closes Strait of Hormuz after US refuses to lift naval blockade; warns all shipping to stay out. Hormuz civilian transit drops to ~3 vessels/day. Kinetic fire still paused.
incidents.description_fa: ایران دوباره تنگه هرمز را بست در واکنش به امتناع آمریکا از رفع محاصره؛ عبور به ~۳ فروند کاهش یافت.

incidents.description: US Navy fires into engine room of Iranian-flagged M/V Touska near Hormuz exit; Marines board and seize vessel. Iran calls it 'piracy,' demands immediate release, vows swift retaliation. Most provocative US action since D1. 25 ships turned back cumulative.
incidents.description_fa: نیروی دریایی آمریکا کشتی توسکا را توقیف کرد؛ ایران آن را ‘دزدی دریایی’ خواند و آزادسازی فوری خواست.

incidents.description: Ghalibaf: 'new cards on battlefield' if ceasefire expires. VP Aref: US demands 'childish and impossible.' Iran formally declines Round 2 Islamabad talks. IRGC visibly pre-positioning for post-ceasefire resumption. 1 day to expiry.
incidents.description_fa: قالیباف: ‘کارت‌های جدید در میدان’؛ عارف: خواسته‌های آمریکا ‘کودکانه’؛ ایران دور دوم را رد کرد.

incidents.description: US seizes second Iran-linked vessel (China-Iran cargo route) in Arabian Sea. Iran calls blockade enforcement illegal under international law.
incidents.description_fa: آمریکا دومین کشتی مرتبط با ایران را در دریای عرب توقیف کرد.

incidents.description: Iran refuses to send any delegation to Islamabad; Vance arrives to empty table. Iran FM: 'We do not negotiate under the shadow of threats.' Ceasefire expires 8PM ET.
incidents.description_fa: ایران هیچ هیئتی به اسلام‌آباد نمی‌فرستد؛ ونس به میز خالی رسید. آتش‌بس ساعت ۸ شب به وقت شرقی منقضی می‌شود.

incidents.description: US Navy boards M/T Tifani overnight — 'right-of-visit, maritime interdiction and boarding' of sanctioned stateless tanker in INDOPACOM area. Third US maritime interdiction since blockade began. Iran calls boardings systematic ceasefire violations.
incidents.description_fa: نیروی دریایی آمریکا شبانه نفتکش تیفانی را بازرسی کرد — سومین عملیات دریایی آمریکا از آغاز محاصره.

incidents.description: Iran issues no official response to Trump's indefinite extension. SNSC silent. FM Araghchi reiterates: 'No negotiations under shadow of threats.' Pakistan reports no contact from Tehran as of afternoon Apr 22.
incidents.description_fa: ایران هیچ پاسخ رسمی به تمدید نامحدود ترامپ نداد. شورای امنیت ملی سکوت کرد.

incidents.description: Iran IRGC confirms seizure of 2 commercial ships and firing on a third in the Strait of Hormuz on Apr 22–23, citing 'violations of maritime regulations.' Seizures represent Iran's counter-blockade response to Trump's indefinite ceasefire extension that maintained the US naval blockade. Iran calls US blockade an 'act of war' and frames IRGC actions as defensive.
incidents.description_fa: سپاه پاسداران انقلاب توقیف دو کشتی تجاری و آتش به کشتی سوم را در تنگه هرمز تأیید کرد.

incidents.target: Lebanon — journalist Amal Khalil among 5 killed
incidents.description: Israeli strikes on Lebanon kill at least 5 people on Apr 23, including Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil. Lebanese government condemns killing as a 'heinous crime.' Strikes threaten Day 8 of Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire. Iran warns of 'strong responses' to Israel's Lebanon actions.
incidents.description_fa: حملات اسرائیل به لبنان در روز ۲۳ آوریل حداقل ۵ نفر از جمله خبرنگار عمال خلیل را کشت.

incidents.description: Trump issues stark ultimatum rhetoric: 'I have all the time in the World, but Iran doesn’t — The clock is ticking!' Blockade continues despite ceasefire; Trump extends Lebanon-Israel ceasefire 3 weeks but maintains naval blockade of Iranian ports as central leverage point. Rubio dismisses speculation of World Cup ban for Iran, signaling calibrated diplomatic de-escalation signal.
incidents.description_fa: ترامپ: 'همه وقت دنیا را دارم اما ایران ندارد — ساعت در حال تیک‌تاک است!' محاصره ادامه دارد. آتش‌بس لبنان-اسرائیل سه هفته تمدید یافت.

incidents.description: Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon kill at least 6 people and wound 2 more (Lebanese MoH) since the 3-week ceasefire extension announced Apr 23. Hezbollah lawmaker Ali Fayyad declares the extension 'meaningless' in light of continued Israeli attacks. Lebanon's Health Ministry total: 2,491 killed, 7,719 wounded since Mar 2.
incidents.description_fa: حملات اسرائیل به جنوب لبنان از ۲۳ آوریل حداقل ۶ نفر را کشته است. نماینده حزب‌الله فیاض تمدید آتش‌بس را 'بی‌معنی' خواند. کل کشته‌های لبنان: ۲٬۴۹۱ نفر.

incidents.description: US naval blockade continues — 31+ ships turned away cumulative; 2 IRGC-seized vessels (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas) still held. Dual blockade persists: US blocks Iranian ports, Iran enforces Hormuz counter-blockade. ~3 vessels/day transiting (97% below pre-war 135). Thousands of seafarers stranded. No new seizures reported Apr 25.
incidents.description_fa: محاصره دریایی آمریکا ادامه دارد — بیش از ۳۱ کشتی بازگردانده شده. دو کشتی توقیف‌شده توسط سپاه همچنان نگه داشته می‌شوند. محاصره دوگانه ادامه دارد.

incidents.description: Dual blockade continues unabated. Bloomberg (Apr 26): 'Hormuz Double Blockade Halts Ship Traffic, Dims Hope for Economy.' ~3 vessels/day transiting (97% below pre-war 135). US: 31+ ships turned away cumulative. Iran: 2 seized ships still held. No new seizures reported Apr 26.
incidents.description_fa: محاصره دوگانه ادامه دارد. بلومبرگ (۲۶ آوریل): 'محاصره دوگانه هرمز ترافیک کشتی‌ها را متوقف می‌کند، امید به بهبود اقتصاد کمرنگ می‌شود.' حدود ۳ کشتی در روز (97صددرصد کمتر از میزان پیش از جنگ).

incidents.description: Trump cancels Witkoff and Kushner's Pakistan trip after Araghchi departs Islamabad without committing to meet US envoys. Trump Truth Social: 'Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work! Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their leadership.' Iran's position: 'no talks under siege' — blockade must end first. Round 2 effectively collapses. Araghchi arrives in Oman to activate back-channel.
incidents.description_fa: ترامپ سفر ویتکاف و کوشنر به پاکستان را لغو کرد. عراقچی بدون تعهد به دیدار از اسلام‌آباد رفت. موضع ایران: 'مذاکره زیر محاصره امکان‌پذیر نیست.'

incidents.description: Suspected Hezbollah drone launched from Lebanon triggers sirens in Western Galilee (Apr 27 morning). IDF says it lost contact with the 'suspicious aerial target' — likely crashed, no confirmed interception. Netanyahu holds security consultations on ceasefire violations. Israeli strikes killed 14 and wounded 37 in Lebanon on Apr 26 (Lebanese Health Ministry). Lebanon 3-week ceasefire extension (Apr 23) strained.
incidents.description_fa: پهپاد مشکوک از لبنان آژیرهای جلیل غربی را به صدا درآورد (۲۷ آوریل). ارتش اسرائیل اعلام کرد تماس با هدف قطع شد — احتمالاً سقوط کرده. نتانیاهو مشاوره‌های امنیتی درباره نقض آتش‌بس برگزار کرد. حملات اسرائیل در ۲۶ آوریل ۱۴ نفر را در لبنان کشت.

incidents.description: Dual blockade continues: US naval blockade of Iranian ports (31+ ships turned away cumulative), Iran IRGC counter-blockade at Hormuz (~3 vessels/day). Two IRGC-seized vessels (MSC Francesca, Epaminondas) still held. No new seizures on Apr 27. Araghchi in Moscow for Putin talks — ceasefire military track holds.
incidents.description_fa: محاصره دوگانه ادامه دارد: محاصره دریایی آمریکا از بنادر ایران (۳۱+ کشتی بازگردانده شده)، ضد‌محاصره سپاه در هرمز (~۳ کشتی در روز). دو کشتی توقیف‌شده همچنان نگه داشته می‌شوند.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump announces 2-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir. Iran SNSC accepts via Araghchi.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ آتش‌بس دو هفته‌ای را اعلام کرد. شورای عالی امنیت ملی ایران از طریق عراقچی پذیرفت.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad peace talks announced for Friday Apr 11. VP Vance to lead US delegation.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات صلح اسلام‌آباد برای جمعه ۱۱ آوریل اعلام شد. وایس پنس وانس هیئت آمریکا را رهبری خواهد کرد.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks reportedly delayed to Saturday Apr 12. Iran delegation composition unclear.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات ظاهراً به شنبه ۱۲ آوریل موکول شد. ترکیب هیئت ایران نامشخص است.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks delayed from Friday to Saturday. Lebanon strikes escalated. Iran re-halted Hormuz opening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات از جمعه به شنبه موکول شد. حملات لبنان تشدید. ایران بازگشایی هرمز متوقف.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad talks began — 21-hour marathon. US delegation ~300 (Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) vs Iran ~70 (Ghalibaf, Araghchi). Largest diplomatic meeting of the war.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات اسلام‌آباد شروع — ماراتن ۲۱ ساعته. هیئت آمریکا ~۳۰۰ (ونس، ویتکاف، کوشنر) مقابل ایران ~۷۰ (قالیباف، عراقچی).

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalism.' No new talks scheduled. Ceasefire expires Apr 21.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس: 'کافی نیست.' قالیباف: 'ماکسیمالیسم آمریکا.' مذاکرات جدید نیست. آتش‌بس ۲۱ آوریل.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TRUMP DECLARES NAVAL BLOCKADE. CENTCOM: all Iranian port traffic blocked starting Monday 10AM ET. No new peace talks scheduled. UK, France, Spain, Turkey refuse to join. China condemns. Diplomatic isolation deepening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ محاصره دریایی اعلام کرد. سنتکام: بنادر ایران از دوشنبه. مذاکرات جدید نیست. بریتانیا، فرانسه، اسپانیا، ترکیه رد. چین محکوم.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Pakistan offers 2nd Islamabad round; Rubio hosts Israel-Lebanon ambassadors Tue
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: پاکستان دور دوم اسلام‌آباد پیشنهاد؛ روبیو میزبان سفرای اسرائیل-لبنان سه‌شنبه
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: First potential Lebanon ceasefire track. Pakistan keeping channel open despite Islamabad collapse.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump 'close to over' (Fox Business) + Iran $270B reparations counter + business internet partial
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ «بسیار نزدیک به پایان» + ضدپیشنهاد ۲۷۰ میلیارد دلار ایران + اینترنت تجاری جزئی
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: $270B reparations + Hormuz sovereignty are biggest gaps; nuclear 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze still unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Munir (Pakistan army chief) in Tehran with US proposal; Trump announces 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 5PM ET; AP: 'in principle' agreement to extend Iran ceasefire beyond Apr 21
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: منیر (رئیس ارتش پاکستان) در تهران با پیشنهاد آمریکا؛ ترامپ آتش‌بس ۱۰ روزه اسرائیل-لبنان از ۵ بعدازظهر؛ توافق «در اصول» برای تمدید آتش‌بس ایران
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: 'In principle' extension not formally agreed (US official to CNBC). Nuclear gap: 5-yr vs 20-yr enrichment freeze, ~440kg HEU stockpile. Hegseth 'restart combat' threat is paired stick. 5 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran declares Hormuz open for commercial transit; US Navy insists blockade on Iranian-linked ships stands; contradictory signals paralyze shipping captains
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران هرمز را برای کشتیرانی تجاری باز اعلام کرد؛ آمریکا می‌گوید محاصره بنادر ایرانی ادامه دارد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Semantic gap on what 'open' means. Iran: all transit free. US: only non-Iranian-linked ships. Ship operators stay anchored. No direct US-Iran talks. 4 days to Apr 21 expiry.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran re-closes Hormuz after US refuses to lift naval blockade; Hormuz transit collapses to ~3 vessels/day; Iran warns ships to stay out
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران هرمز را دوباره بست پس از امتناع آمریکا از رفع محاصره
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Hormuz closure reverses brief Apr 17 relief. Economic warfare resumes in parallel with kinetic ceasefire. 3 days to Apr 21 expiry. Nuclear / enrichment demands remain fully unresolved.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: US seizes M/V Touska; Iran demands release, calls it piracy, vows retaliation; Iran FM says no delegation to Pakistan
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: آمریکا توسکا را توقیف کرد؛ ایران آن را دزدی دریایی خواند و هیئتی به پاکستان نمی‌فرسد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Ship seizure most provocative US action since D1. Iran refuses Round 2. 2 days to expiry. Hormuz closed. 25 ships turned back. Touska crew in US custody. Ceasefire kinetically intact but politically on life-support.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Iran formally refuses Round 2 talks; Ghalibaf 'new cards on battlefield'; VP Aref 'US demands impossible'; Trump 'maybe I won't extend it — have to start dropping bombs again'
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ایران رسماً دور دوم مذاکرات را رد کرد؛ قالیباف هشدار داد؛ ترامپ تهدید جنگ داد
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Both sides escalating rhetoric. Iran no-show at Islamabad. Trump bombing threat. Nuclear gap: Iran wants 20-yr enrichment right; US wants zero enrichment. 1 day to Apr 21 expiry. IRGC pre-positioning.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: EXPIRY DAY: Vance + Witkoff + Kushner arrive Islamabad; Iran sends no delegation; Trump 'highly unlikely' to extend; ceasefire expires 8PM ET; second US ship seizure Arabian Sea
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: روز انقضا: ونس به اسلام‌آباد رسید؛ ایران غایب؛ ترامپ: تمدید ‘بسیار بعید است’؛ آتش‌بس ساعت ۸ شب منقضی می‌شود
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Vance at empty table. Iran FM: 'no negotiations under threat of force.' Nuclear / HEU / enrichment / Hormuz reopening — all gaps unresolved. Ceasefire expires 8PM ET. War likely resumes D54.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely at Pakistan's request; Iran silent — no delegation, no proposal, Vance trip cancelled
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ آتش‌بس را به‌درخواست پاکستان به‌صورت نامحدود تمدید کرد؛ ایران سکوت کرد — هیچ هیئتی، هیچ پیشنهادی
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran refuses to submit 'unified proposal' while blockade continues. Trump: extension holds until proposal submitted and 'discussions concluded one way or the other.' Iran FM: 'No negotiations under shadow of threats.' Internal Iran fracture: Khamenei hardliners vs. Araghchi pragmatists. Nuclear enrichment gap remains fundamental — US zero enrichment vs. Iran 20-yr right. Oil +5.1% reflects market skepticism.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump 'no time frame' on Iran war; IRGC tightens grip; civilian FM track sidelined; second Islamabad round indefinitely stalled
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ: 'هیچ جدول زمانی' برای جنگ ایران. سپاه پاسداران قدرت را سفت کردند؛ وزارت خارجه غیرفعال شد.
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Trump's 'no timeframe' removes urgency; IRGC dominance over civilian FM track means no unified Iranian proposal is likely soon. Iran: Araghchi's pragmatist position undercut by IRGC hardliners who seized Hormuz ships hours after ceasefire extension. US blockade remains central grievance. Nuclear enrichment gap unresolved. Second Islamabad round has no date. Lebanon strikes further complicate Iran's political calculus.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Lebanon ceasefire extended 3 weeks after White House talks; Trump 'clock ticking' for Tehran; Rubio signals World Cup goodwill; Iran-US Round 2 still has no date
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: آتش‌بس لبنان برای سه هفته دیگر تمدید یافت؛ ترامپ: ساعت برای تهران در حال تیک‌تاک؛ روبیو سیگنال جام جهانی فوتبال را می‌دهد؛ دور دوم اسلام‌آباد هنوز تاریخ ندارد.
ceasefireNegotiations.outcome: partial — Lebanon track advanced; Iran-US track stalled
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran-US: No unified proposal submitted despite indefinite ceasefire. Blockade continues as Tehran’s central grievance. IRGC dominance over civilian FM track means no credible Iranian negotiating voice. Lebanon: 3-week extension buys time but Hezbollah-Israel tensions remain structural. Trump’s ‘clock is ticking’ creates rhetorical pressure but without back-channel, Iran cannot respond even if willing. Second Islamabad round has no confirmed date.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Araghchi arrives in Islamabad; Witkoff + Kushner en route to Pakistan for Round 2 — Iran denies direct US meeting; Ghalibaf absent, Vance not traveling; possible Monday meeting
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: عراقچی وارد اسلام‌آباد شد؛ ویتکوف و کوشنر در راه پاکستان برای دور دوم مذاکرات — ایران دیدار مستقیم را انکار می‌کند؛ قالیباف غایب؛ احتمال دیدار روز دوشنبه
ceasefireNegotiations.outcome: uncertain — format disputed; direct US-Iran meeting possible Monday Apr 27
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran's public denial of direct US-Iran meeting vs. White House confirmation of 'direct talks' creates pre-negotiation uncertainty. Ghalibaf absent (IRGC speaker) is key signal — positive if IRGC allowing civilian track to lead, negative if hardliners are blocking. Blockade remains Iran's red line: no lifting without ceasefire terms guaranteeing nuclear sovereignty and end to hostilities. No unified Iranian proposal submitted. If Witkoff-Araghchi meeting proceeds Monday, key test: can civilian FM Araghchi deliver commitments that IRGC will honor?

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Round 2 collapses before it starts: Trump cancels Witkoff/Kushner Pakistan trip after Araghchi departs Islamabad; Araghchi arrives in Oman to activate back-channel; Iran: 'no talks under siege'; no Round 3 date set
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: دور دوم قبل از شروع شکست خورد: ترامپ سفر ویتکاف/کوشنر به پاکستان را لغو کرد؛ عراقچی به عمان رفت؛ ایران: 'مذاکره زیر محاصره نه'
ceasefireNegotiations.outcome: breakdown — Round 2 collapsed before meeting; Oman back-channel activated
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran insists blockade must be lifted before talks can proceed ('no talks under siege'). Trump cancelled trip to signal strength: 'we have all the cards — if they want to talk, all they have to do is call.' Accuses Iranian leadership of 'infighting and confusion' (referencing IRGC vs. civilian FM divisions). Araghchi in Oman activates traditional US-Iran back-channel (Oman brokered 2013 secret US-Iran talks and JCPOA preliminary channel). Key test: can Oman re-engineer the format as indirect talks, giving Iran domestic cover while satisfying Trump’s demand to be 'called'? No Round 3 date. Araghchi plans to return to Pakistan after Oman before Russia visit.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Araghchi arrives in Moscow/St. Petersburg for talks with Putin; Trump says 'Tehran can come to us, or call us' — no envoys dispatched; Oman back-channel still warming; no Round 3 date
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: عراقچی برای مذاکره با پوتین وارد مسکو/سن‌پترزبورگ شد؛ ترامپ: 'تهران می‌تواند با ما تماس بگیرد'؛ کانال پشتی عمان در حال آماده‌سازی؛ دور سوم بدون تاریخ
ceasefireNegotiations.outcome: Iran pivoting to Moscow axis — no direct US-Iran contact; Oman back-channel format under negotiation
ceasefireNegotiations.keyGap: Iran's Moscow visit signals two things simultaneously: (1) Tehran is not desperate and has Russian strategic backing; (2) Iran is seeking a back-channel format that avoids the 'negotiations under siege' domestic political trap. Trump's 'just call us' formulation preserves US dominance optics while leaving the door open. The Oman channel — which historically brokered 2013 secret US-Iran talks and JCPOA groundwork — may be able to engineer a phone/indirect format. Key unresolved: blockade vs. Iran sovereignty over Hormuz; Iran still insists blockade must end before formal talks resume. Russia's role: diplomatic backstop but not a mediator — Moscow will not pressure Tehran to accept US terms.

ceasefireEconomicRecovery.note: Hormuz double blockade persists as of D59 (Apr 27). ~3 vessels/day. US: 31+ ships turned away cumulative. Iran IRGC: 2 seized vessels still held. Brent $106.20 (+0.8%), WTI $95.10 (+0.7%) — oil uptick as Araghchi-Putin meeting signals no imminent deal. Internet Day 60 — 'Internet Pro' paid-access only; $40M/day direct cost; cumulative ~$2.58B+ est. Rial ~1.32M/USD (est). Lebanon: 2,491+ killed. IMF: Iran GDP −6.1%, inflation 68.9%; food inflation 105%. Iran FM in Moscow for Putin talks — Round 3 date unknown; Oman back-channel warming. ⚠ ceasefireMode.enabled=true — ceasefire extended indefinitely; user should update expiresAt field.

branchExtend.detail: Most likely if framework but no final agreement. Pakistan mediates.

branchDeal.detail: Mine clearance, insurance normalization, escorts resume.

branchCollapse.detail: Immediate return to pre-ceasefire dynamics. Worse — broken trust amplifies.
Worse than before — broken ceasefire = higher risk premium.

branchStalled.detail: Talks stall, Hormuz slow, both sides posturing.
Tension builds. Markets re-price war risk.
